title: Upon Waking Up
textArabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَ مَا أَمَاتَنَا وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ
textTransliteration: Alhamdu lillahil-ladhi ahyana ba‘da ma amatana wa ilayhin-nushur.
textTranslation: All praise is for Allah who gave us life after causing us to die, and to Him is the resurrection.

title: Before Sleeping
textTranslation: In Your name, O Allah, I die and I live.

title: After Eating
textArabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنِي هَذَا وَرَزَقَنِيهِ مِنْ غَيْرِ حَوْلٍ مِنِّي وَلَا قُوَّةٍ
textTransliteration: Alhamdu lillahil-ladhi at‘amani hadha wa razaqanihi min ghayri hawlin minni wa la quwwah.
textTranslation: All praise is for Allah who fed me this and provided it for me without any strength or power from me.

title: Entering Home
textArabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّٰهِ وَلَجْنَا، وَبِسْمِ ٱللَّٰهِ خَرَجْنَا، وَعَلَى ٱللَّٰهِ رَبِّنَا تَوَكَّلْنَا
textTransliteration: Bismillahi walajna, wa bismillahi kharajna, wa ‘alallahi rabbina tawakkalna.
textTranslation: In the name of Allah we enter, in the name of Allah we leave, and upon our Lord we rely.

title: Leaving Home
textArabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّٰهِ، تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى ٱللَّٰهِ، وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِٱللَّٰهِ
textTransliteration: Bismillah, tawakkaltu ‘alallah, wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billah.
textTranslation: In the name of Allah, I rely upon Allah, and there is no power nor strength except with Allah.

title: Entering Restroom
textArabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْخُبُثِ وَالْخَبَائِثِ
textTransliteration: Allahumma inni a‘udhu bika minal-khubthi wal-khaba’ith.
textTranslation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from male and female devils.

title: Entering Masjid
textTranslation: O Allah, open for me the doors of Your mercy.

title: Leaving Masjid
textTranslation: O Allah, I ask You from Your bounty.

title: After Adhan
textArabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ هٰذِهِ الدَّعْوَةِ التَّامَّةِ وَالصَّلَاةِ الْقَائِمَةِ، آتِ مُحَمَّدًا الْوَسِيلَةَ وَالْفَضِيلَةَ، وَابْعَثْهُ مَقَامًا مَحْمُودًا الَّذِي وَعَدْتَهُ
textTransliteration: Allahumma rabba hathihid-da‘watit-tammah was-salatil-qa’imah, ati Muhammadan al-wasilata wal-fadilah, wab‘athhu maqaman mahmudan alladhi wa‘adtah.
textTranslation: O Allah, Lord of this perfect call and established prayer, grant Muhammad the station of intercession and favor, and raise him to the praised مقام you promised him.

title: After Wudu
textArabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا ٱللَّٰهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا عَبْدُهُ وَرَسُولُهُ
textTransliteration: Ashhadu an la ilaha illallah wahdahu la sharika lah, wa ashhadu anna Muhammadan ‘abduhu wa rasuluh.
textTranslation: I bear witness that there is no god but Allah alone with no partner, and I bear witness that Muhammad is His servant and messenger.

title: Travel Dua
textArabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَٰذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ، وَإِنَّا إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا لَمُنقَلِبُونَ
textTransliteration: Subhanal-ladhi sakhkhara lana hadha wa ma kunna lahu muqrinin, wa inna ila rabbina lamunqalibun.
textTranslation: Glory be to the One who made this subservient to us, and we could not have done it by ourselves; and surely to our Lord we will return.
